filename: Should we adopt a Franchise-like model_.docx
summary: This document outlines strategic considerations for adopting a franchise-like model versus centralized operations for healthcare expansion. It details legal structures such as Medical Service Agreements (MSA) and Series LLCs, highlighting regulatory constraints like the corporate practice of medicine doctrine. The notes compare pros and cons of different models and include insights on revenue flow and physician ownership.
